description_long: This bungalow features two connected sections forming an L-shape, each with a steeply pitched, dark brown gabled roof. The exterior walls are a light beige color with brown trim, and the structure is adorned with multiple arched windows that emit a warm, inviting glow. The front facade includes two prominent entry doors, each set beneath a small gable, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides. The rear and side elevations display cross-braced wooden details, adding a rustic touch to the design. The roof surfaces are ribbed, suggesting a tiled or shingled material, and the overall appearance is reminiscent of a traditional European countryside cottage. The building sits low to the ground, with no visible porch or elevated foundation.
description: A charming L-shaped bungalow with steep brown gabled roofs, beige walls, and arched windows, evoking a rustic European cottage style.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing two main entrances, arched windows, and the L-shaped connection between the two sections.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facades of both sections, with both entry doors and symmetrical window arrangements clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow are shown, featuring cross-braced wooden details and fewer windows, emphasizing the building's rustic character.
description_view_3: The back of the bungalow is visible, displaying the long ribbed roof and a symmetrical arrangement of windows along the rear wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
